query_title: TPB AFK: The Pirate Bay - Away from Keyboard

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Fahrenheit 11/9
recommendations.overview: Michael Moore's provocative documentary explores the two most important questions of the Trump Era: How did we get here, and how do we get out.

recommendations.title: Bombshell: The Hedy Lamarr Story
recommendations.overview: The life and career of the hailed Hollywood movie star and underappreciated genius inventor, Hedy Lamarr.

recommendations.title: Why Did You Kill Me?
recommendations.overview: The line between justice and revenge blurs when a devastated family uses social media to track down the people who killed 24-year-old Crystal Theobald.

recommendations.title: Who Am I
recommendations.overview: Benjamin, a young German computer whiz, is invited to join a subversive hacker group that wants to be noticed on the world's stage.

recommendations.title: Sly
recommendations.overview: His love of film began as an escape from a rocky childhood. From underdog to Hollywood legend, Sylvester Stallone tells his story in this documentary.

recommendations.title: The Summit

recommendations.title: The Mystery of Marilyn Monroe: The Unheard Tapes
recommendations.overview: This documentary explores the mystery surrounding the death of movie icon Marilyn Monroe through previously unheard interviews with her inner circle.

recommendations.title: All the Beauty and the Bloodshed

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.
